text:
Once upon a time in the small Scottish town of Lochgilpighie, there lived a curious, golden retriever named Ginger. Ginger loved exploring the dense forests nearby and often discovered ancient stones that whispered old legends.

One chilly autumn day, as Ginger played amongst the crags of Callanish, he heard a voice calling his name. Looking up, he saw a wise old hawk perched on a large limestone boulder. The hawk spoke in a raspy tone.

"In these parts," he said, "the stones echo the echoes of forgotten battles. Listen closely, young Ginger, and you shall hear tales of valor."

Ginger leaned closer, his ears prickling. The hawks continued, "Long ago, two brothers, skilled warriors, battled for the right to inherit the kingship. They fought not only against each other but also the fierce dragons that roamed these cliffs."

"Oh,” whispered Ginger, “like brothers?”
